external_services.service_name: Issuance of BIR Form 2306 and/or 2307 to Suppliers/ Contractors/ Service Providers
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of BIR Form 2306 and_or 2307 to Job Order_ Contract of Service

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Fully accomplished and duly signed Disbursement Voucher/s – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Provide the photocopy of Disbursement Vouchers to the Lipa City Accounting Office- Accounting Division *Wait for the processing of BIR Form 2306 and/or 2307
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the photocopy of the Disbursement Vouchers; 1.2. Verify correctness; 1.3. Generate BIR Form 2306 and/or 2307
steps.person_responsible: Admin Assistant III (Lipa City Accounting Office)
Admin Assistant III (Lipa City Accounting Office)

external_services.service_name: Review and Approval of Barangay Transactions
external_services.office: Lipa City Accounting Office – Barangay Division

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Purchase or Projects below P50,000.00 - 1 original and 2 photocopies
Purchase or Projects above P50,000.00 - 1 original and 2 photocopies

steps.client_step: 1. Proceed to the Lipa City Accounting Office – Barangay Division to request for the appropriate checklist
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Accounting Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Prepare the required documents and submit to the City Accounting Office – Barangay Division
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Review information; 2.2 Return for revision if incomplete; 2.3 Sign off as preparer and approver if in order
steps.processing_time: Simple: 1 day; Complex: 2 days; Incomplete: +1 day
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Administrative Officer II, Accountant IV

steps.client_step: 3. Claim the Disbursement Voucher and supporting documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Accounting Office)

external_services.total_processing_time: Simple: 1 day & 5 mins; Complex: 2 days & 5 mins; Discrepancy: +1 day & 5 mins
